creator: webmaster@ncds.org
text:
After I install FreeBSD 4.3, I am looking to install the xFree86 packages, some install right, till it gets to XFree86-4.0.3_1.tgz - My computer locks up, and everything freezes. I tried to install the package from FTP & CD-Rom, both failed.

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD, install XFree86 Servers.
